revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{Commons category}}[[Category:Supercategory 2]]{{Wikisource cat}}[[Category:Supercategory 2]]{{Wikiquote|Category:1289 deaths}}[[Category:Supercategory 2]] {{Death year category header|128|9}}[[Category:Supercategory 2]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Supercategory 2]]" to ""
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "\{\{draft categories\|[^]]+\}\}" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>"
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Commons category}}{{Wikisource cat}}{{Wikiquote|Category:1289 deaths}} {{Death year category header|128|9}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude> [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:1289 deaths]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1289_deaths here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
